threats.title: Seven Malicious Vite npm Packages Use Blockchain C2 to Deliver a RAT
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a cluster of seven malicious npm packages targeting the Vite frontend tooling ecosystem as part of a software supply chain attack. threats.title: New NadMesh Botnet Hunts Exposed AI Services for Cloud Keys and Kubernetes Tokens
threats.summary: A Go botnet called NadMesh turned up in early July hunting exposed AI services, and the operator's own dashboard claims 3,811 unique AWS keys. A Shodan harvester keeps the scan queue stocked with ComfyUI, Ollama, n8n, Open WebUI, Langflow, and Gradio: the image generators, local model runners, and workflow builders that teams stand up fast and firewall late. threats.title: GoldenEyeDog Subgroup Linked to DigiCert Breach and Code-Signing Certificate Theft

threats.title: Fake Coding Tests Deliver OtterCookie-Aligned Malware Hidden in SVG Flag Images
threats.summary: North Korean threat actors linked to the Contagious Interview campaign have been observed employing steganography in SVG image files to conceal malicious payloads as part of a campaign using fake job postings and coding challenges. threats.title: E.U. Orders Google to Open Android Mic, Camera and Screen to Rival AI Assistants
threats.summary: The European Commission on Thursday ordered Google to give rival AI assistants the same reach into Android that Gemini already has: the camera, the microphone, whatever is on screen, a wake word that fires with the display off, and the ability to drive other apps in the background by imitating taps and typing.
